mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_agent WHERE code = #{code} AND enabled = b'1' LIMIT 1

SELECT s.* FROM ai_agent a JOIN ai_agent_skill aks ON aks.agent_id = a.id AND aks.enabled = b'1' JOIN ai_skill s ON s.id = aks.skill_id AND s.enabled = b'1' WHERE a.code = #{code} AND a.enabled = b'1' ORDER BY aks.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC
